{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323041301CCEFA056C4A6AB11831B\"}"},"total":127},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7127959399545062159","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩前面开始的内容很好，就是张妙妙，其实在面临家人和未结婚的男友中哪怕再艰难大多数人都会选家人，我感觉这本书最大的遗憾就是张妙妙这个人，面对那种未知的情况她能怎么办，而且她也没有和武洪做出格的事。但我毕竟不是作者，但如果我是作者的话我可能会下更多的文笔去洗白张妙妙，这样读起来作为一个读者的我真的很快乐。作者写的很好能出完一本书的文采一定不会差。加油。但我还是想把张妙妙的遗憾给补上。希望作者再次写此类小说时能尽量把作者初恋女友写成一生的女友。谢谢作者的努力。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1659607441,"group_id":"6816014162666195981","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢写生活，喜欢生活","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N33cbqX521mSpqL48PtXyZtinEIfIdBcTOHpnNPc9+9C","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6fa51a66416b428981807e91d5f5854c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776796396\u0026x-signature=%2FOGA%2BcJlLC5rmlBDMoTgxpKvowQ%3D","user_id":"4055468418274820","user_name":"为她写些东西吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4055468418274820","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6816014162666195981","book_info":{"abstract":"长生九万年，开局就举世无敌。凡人梦寐以求的快乐，对于他来
